titleStmt.title: SII 41.119: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 119. (A.R. No. 118 of 1905.) Tiruvālīśvaram, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Vālīśvara temple at Tiruvālīśvaram.

summary.p: Vaṭṭeluttu. Relates to above two inscriptions (116 and 117 of 1905.) The sabhā assigned part of the land given by the donor mentioned in 116 of 1905 above as hereditary kārāṇmai to Piḍavūr-uḍaiyāṉ Ambalavaṉ Āṟaikkāvaṉ. The samvatsara-vāriyar committee was asked to execute the decision.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . yāṇṭu patiṉeṭṭu nāḷ munnūṟṟaimpatu śrīrājarāja ccaturvvedimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyOm Em samvatsaravāriyar kaṇṭu coṉāṭṭu vaṭakaraip piṭavūr nāṭṭup piṭavūruṭaiyāṉ Amapalava
ṉ niṟāṭi nampakkal nammūr vaṭapaṭākai kaṭiñaikku meṟkkum veññirppaṉoḻikku vaṭakkum tiruvāliśvaravatikkum kiḻakkum śrīvāsuteva vāykkālukkut teṟkkum Oṉpatāṅkaṇṇāṟṟut tiruvā
liśvaravatikkum kiḻakkut teṟkkaṭaiyak kāṇiyaraikāṇik kottaṅ kiḻakku nokkik kaṭiñaikkēy yiḻinta Ikkāṇi Araikkāṇik kotta mūṉṟukku Itaṉukkut teṟkku mivvicaitta perunāṉkel
laiyil kiṭanta nilattil śrīkoyil vaḷākamuṅ kollaiyuṅ kaḻiccu nammūr nilamaḷavu kolāl niṟai koṇṭuṭaiya nilaṉ veli Innilaṉ velikkum Oṭṭiṟaiyāka Ikkaṭiñaikkarai tiruvāli
śvarattut tevarkku nitta muḻakku neyyāl muṭṭāmalivaṉ Erikkakkaṭava tirunontāviḷakku Oṉṟu Oṉṟiṉukkum Innilaṉ veliyilum Iraṇṭumā nilam nikki niṉṟa nilaṉ mukkāle mūṉṟumā ni
lam tiruvāliśvarattut tevar Akanāḻikaiyārkkum Uvaccarkaḷukkuñ caṅkamūtikaḷukkum Uṭpaṭa nivantakāṟarkku Ippiṭavūruṭaiyāṉ Ampalava niṟāṭikuṭutta nilaṉ Eḻu
māvarai Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum nikki niṉṟa nilaṉ Arai
ye kāṇi muntirikaiyum Ittevarkkut tiruvamirtuṭpaṭa
veṇṭuvatukku vāṭākkaṭaṉ māttāl muppatiṉ kalanel Aññāḻi
Ūrkkālāl Āṭṭai vaṭṭam munnūṟṟu Oṉpatiṉ kalaṉe tūṇi I
runāḻi Uriy nellaṭṭuvāṉāka Ivvampalavaṉ niṟāṭi pakkal Iv
varaiye kāṇi muntirikai nilamuṅ kāṇiyākap peṟṟuṭaiya piṭavūru
ṭaiyāṉampalavaṉāṟaik kāvaṉukku mivaṉ Ancayattāṟkkum Innilaṉ A
raiyē kāṇi muntirikaiyum cantrādityavaraik kārāṇmaiyāvatākavu mikkārāṇmaip
paṭi nam samvasaravāriyar tiruvāliśvarattut tevar śrī koyiliṟ kaṉmēl
veṭṭuvippārākavum paṇiccuk karaiyiṭṭu karaiponta cēri śrī cempi
yaṉ mahādeviccēric cempurai kovaṭi caṅkarabhaṭṭarpaṇikka śrīlo
kamahādevicceri ciṟunālūrc cāttapirāṉ bhaṭṭar paṇikka śrī A
ruḷmoḻitevacceri Iḻakkan tiṟattu viṣṇubhaṭṭar paṇikka śrī cuntara coḻacce
ri Amittaṉūr nārāyaṇakkiramavittar paṇip paṇiyiṟṟa paṇiccuttiṭṭuk
kuṭuttom mahāsabhaim mahāsabhaiyor paṇikka Eḻutiṉāṉivvūrc ca
vai kaṇakkaṉ
Digital edition of SII 41.119 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
